results.title: Old School | 6 Hole Baseplate | Independent Skateboard Trucks
results.snippet: The 6 holes baseplates are adaptable to both recent skateboard decks and old-school ones. All non-forged models in 109, 159, 169, and 215 sizes come with 6 hole baseplates.
